name: search-bar
description: Search input with clear button, custom search icon, and submit handler

props.name: value
props.description: Current text value of the search input.

props.name: onChangeText
props.description: Callback fired as the user types in the search field.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Optional callback fired when the clear button is pressed.

props.name: onSearch
props.description: Optional callback fired when the user submits the search (keyboard action).

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the search bar container.

props.name: searchIcon
props.description: Custom icon character displayed on the left of the input.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling height and horizontal padding.
